description: Create a new create-pr skill that generates Pull Requests via gh CLI, completing the end-to-end Issue Flow pipeline with automated PR creation from branch context, planning artifacts, and issue data.

userStories.title: Create SKILL.md with frontmatter and prompt
userStories.description: As a skill maintainer, I want a skills/create-pr/SKILL.md file with proper frontmatter and a detailed prompt workflow so that Claude Code can execute the PR creation skill.
acceptanceCriteria: File skills/create-pr/SKILL.md exists with valid frontmatter (name, description, compatibility)
Frontmatter description includes trigger phrases: create a pr, open a pull request, submit pr, create pr for this branch
Prompt includes Step 0: environment validation (gh CLI authenticated, inside a git repo)

Prompt includes Step 1: branch detection — reads current branch, extracts issue number from issue/{N}-* pattern, infers base branch from tracking branch / tasks.json baseBranch field / main/master/dev fallback
Prompt includes Step 2: context collection — reads issue via gh issue view, reads issues/{N}/prd.md and issues/{N}/tasks.json if they exist, runs git log and git diff --stat against base branch
Prompt includes Step 3: duplicate PR detection — checks for existing open PRs on the same branch via gh pr list --head <branch>

Prompt includes Step 4: PR generation — creates PR with standardized title, structured description body (summary, changes, user stories, review checklist), labels from the issue, and Closes #N linking
Prompt includes graceful degradation: works without artifacts by using only git log/diff and issue data
Prompt includes error handling for common gh failures (auth, permissions, 404)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create README.md for the skill
userStories.description: As a user, I want a skills/create-pr/README.md with usage examples, trigger phrases, and workflow description so that I can understand how to use the skill.
acceptanceCriteria: File skills/create-pr/README.md exists
Includes a brief description of what the skill does
Includes usage examples with trigger phrases (e.g., Create a PR, Open a pull request for this branch, Submit PR for issue #42)
Includes a How It Works section listing the steps (validate, detect branch, collect context, check duplicates, create PR)
Includes a Requirements section (gh CLI, git)
Follows the same structure and tone as skills/resolve-issue/README.md and skills/generate-issue/README.md
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update main README.md — skills table, diagram, and walkthrough
userStories.description: As a user browsing the repository, I want the main README.md to include create-pr in the skills table, the mermaid workflow diagram, and the interactive walkthrough so that the skill is discoverable and the full pipeline is documented.
acceptanceCriteria: The skills table in README.md includes a row for create-pr with description and link to skills/create-pr/
The mermaid diagram shows create-pr as an optional step (dashed line or separate path) after execute-tasks / issue completion
The interactive walkthrough includes a new collapsed section (step 5) explaining how to use create-pr after development is complete
Existing content in README.md is preserved — only additions are made
The mermaid diagram renders correctly (valid mermaid syntax)
Typecheck passes
